widgetData.source_sentence: You haven't changed. Heard about your leg.
sentences: How come Every time you compliment me, it sounds like an accusation?
I will grant amnesty to all brothers who thrown down their arms before nightfall. And you, Ser Davos, I will allow you to travel south, a free man with a fresh horse.
Yeah, pulled a hamstring playing Twister. Just gonna walk it off. So, who's the girl?

widgetData.source_sentence: Me too. What do you do?
sentences: I like you.
You can't, because that would involve touParkng me and then things would get so sexually charged Cameron physically stops him.
Stuff.

widgetData.source_sentence: to House I found her in the clinic giving herself IV fluids.
sentences: Im not having this conversation with you, Ma!
At least you could've let her finish. She looks terrible.
He switched jobs to save his marriage. He did it to avoid change.

widgetData.source_sentence: Fine. Let's test your theory. Remove his pacing wire. If he's better, his heart'll beat just fine on its own, and then he can have his operation.
sentences: I quit.
Im sorry if this stuff is gonna make the ceremony awkward.
If I'm right, his heart will stop. beat Kutner, keep the paddles on stand-by.

widgetData.source_sentence: No, not yet! Takes his hands off his face. I don't know what to say.
sentences: Youre crazy, go crazy.
half-laugh They usually are. Do you have a buzzer or something. What time does this class end?
Just... be straight with her.
